releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
fix(update): 修复更新帖子时"标题已被使用"的422错误
- 修复更新已发布文章时出现的"标题已被使用"错误
- 优化更新逻辑，避免不必要的标题重复检查
- 统一元数据获取方式，确保使用正确的帖子ID


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.32...1.0.33

releases.description:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
```
feat: 添加发布后自动打开帖子链接功能

新增自动打开 Discourse 帖子链接功能，可在设置中配置开关。发布成功后自动在浏览器中打开帖子链接，提升用户体验。
```

```
feat(utils): 添加多论坛元数据管理功能, 修复多论坛发布bug

添加论坛标识生成器和元数据管理工具，支持多论坛场景下的元数据存储

重构主模块使用新的元数据管理方式，替代原有的单一论坛frontmatter存储
```


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.29...1.0.30

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
refactor(ui): 统一将样式类名前缀从discourse改为ptd

重构所有UI组件和样式文件，将类名前缀从'discourse-'统一改为'ptd-'，保持命名一致性

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.28...1.0.29

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
feat(标题处理): 添加强制使用文件名作为标题的选项

默认情况下优先使用front matter中的title，没有则使用文件名。新增设置选项可强制使用文件名作为标题，完全忽略front matter中的title

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.27...1.0.28

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: 新增多论坛功能，支持配置多个论坛预设并在发布时选择目标论坛。更新设置界面，添加标签导航和论坛预设管理。更新国际化文件以支持多语言提示。 Added multi-forum functionality, supporting the configuration of multiple forum presets and selecting the target forum during publishing. Updated the settings interface to include tag navigation and forum preset management. Updated internationalization files to support multilingual prompts. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.24...1.0.25

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 新增跳过一级标题选项，优化发布到 Discourse 的内容处理

适配`Filename Heading Sync`插件

- 在配置中添加 skipH1 字段，默认为 false
- 更新发布逻辑，支持根据设置跳过 Markdown 中的 H1 标题
- 添加相应的国际化支持，包括英文和中文描述


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.16...1.0.17

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
新增主题信息获取功能，完善 Discourse 同步机制

在 DiscourseAPI 中添加 fetchTopicInfo 和 fetchTopicTags 方法
更新发布流程，支持从 Discourse 同步最新标签和分类信息
在更新帖子时自动获取并同步 Discourse 上的标签和分类
扩展 Front Matter，新增 discourse_category_id 和 discourse_category 字段
优化更新逻辑，确保本地文件与 Discourse 内容保持一致


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.15...1.0.16

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
重构标签处理逻辑，移除配置中的固定标签设置
- 从配置中删除 selectedTags 字段
- 在 ActiveFile 接口中新增 tags 属性
- 调整标签处理流程，从文件的 Front Matter 获取标签
- 更新发布和更新帖子时的标签处理方式
- 优化标签选择和保存机制

重构插件架构，解耦主要功能模块
- 将主类拆分为多个专注的模块，如 DiscourseAPI、EmbedHandler
- 重命名主类为 PublishToDiscourse，提高语义清晰度
- 抽取通用工具函数到独立模块
- 优化代码结构，提高可维护性和可读性
- 调整 Front Matter 处理和嵌入内容处理逻辑


Refactor the tag handling logic and remove fixed tag settings from the configuration
- Remove the selectedTags field from the configuration
- Add a tags property to the ActiveFile interface
- Adjust the tag processing workflow to obtain tags from the file's Front Matter
- Update the tag processing method when publishing and updating posts
- Optimize the tag selection and saving mechanism

Refactor the plugin architecture to decouple the main functional modules
- Split the main class into multiple focused modules, such as DiscourseAPI and EmbedHandler
- Rename the main class to PublishToDiscourse to improve semantic clarity
- Extract common utility functions into a separate module
- Optimize code structure to improve maintainability and readability
- Adjust the logic for handling Front Matter and embedded content

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.14...1.0.15

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.12...1.0.14

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
优化图片引用处理和 activeFile 管理逻辑

- 改进图片引用正则表达式，支持带属性的图片链接
- 更新图片替换方法，确保正确处理带属性的图片引用
- 重构 openCategoryModal 方法，每次都获取最新的文件内容
- 在文件修改后更新 activeFile 对象，确保状态同步


Optimize image reference handling and activeFile management logic

- Improve the regex for image references to support image links with attributes
- Update the image replacement method to ensure correct handling of image references with attributes
- Refactor the openCategoryModal method to always retrieve the latest file content
- Update the activeFile object after file modifications to ensure status synchronization



**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.12...1.0.13

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
修复"通过命令面板"发布的错误.

- 在 `SelectCategoryModal.onOpen` 方法中添加防御性检查
- 在 `openCategoryModal` 方法中添加检查

Fixed the error when publishing through the command palette.

- Added defensive checks in the `SelectCategoryModal.onOpen` method.
- Added checks in the `openCategoryModal` method.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.11...1.0.12

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
在配置页面, 添加测试key是否有效的功能

Add the function to test whether the key is valid on the configuration page

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.10...1.0.11

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/64e04724-3c22-4f6e-a792-dd0d738d194e

https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/issues/10#issuecomment-2703911154



### 优化帖子更新逻辑，支持同时更新帖子内容和主题信息

- 分离帖子内容和主题更新流程
- 添加对主题标题和标签的单独更新支持
- 改进错误处理和响应处理机制
- 在标签选择模态框中添加更新时的标签初始化

### Optimize Post Update Logic to Support Simultaneous Updates of Post Content and Topic Information

- Separate the update processes for post content and topic information  
- Add support for individual updates to topic titles and tags  
- Improve error handling and response mechanisms  
- Initialize tags when updating in the tag selection modal  

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.9...1.0.10

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/woodchen-ink/obsidian-publish-to-discourse/compare/1.0.4...1.0.5

实现发布时添加标签功能

1. 输入时, 显示匹配待选项(已有标签)
2. 可以通过回车或者点击来选择标签
3. 支持输入新标签, 会根据用户在discourse上的"信用等级"判断, 目前一般是3级及以上具有创建标签权限, 所以根据用户Level来判断是否可以创建标签

![20250124-171343](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6e46c70e-e360-4055-9fa4-a77a279838b5)
